key_findings: Policy applicability: 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md is the sole applicable reimbursement policy for the full 2025 year (effective 2025-01-01 per 第十四条). 02_expense_reimbursement_2022_deprecated.md is explicitly repealed and must not be used as current approval basis (第十四条, 02 第四条).
R01 Duplicate (第十条): Same invoice reimbursed at most once. Any invoice appearing in multiple records is a duplicate reimbursement risk. No exemptions apply.
R02 Split (第十一条 + 03 附件二 AR-03): Same employee, same expense_type, within 7 calendar days, ≥2 records, combined amount ≥10,000元 triggers split-claim scrutiny for circumventing approval thresholds.

R03 Excess (第十二条): Without special_approval, reimbursement amount must not exceed 1.0× the applicable standard. Standards from: 04_travel (lodging by level+tier: 300-1100元/晚), 05_training (course ≤3500/term, internal ≤800/day, external ≤1200/day, lodging 350-500/晚), 06_entertainment (single ≤5000, per_person ≤300), 07_office_comm (office ≤600/person/month, comm ≤300/person/month).
R04 Budget (第十三条 + 08 第三条): Department cumulative approved usage ≥ annual budget prohibits further reimbursement. Special_approval exempts.
R05 Late (第七条): Expense_date to reimburse_date gap > 60 days constitutes late reimbursement. No special_approval exemption.
Approval tiers from 03_authorization_management.md 附件二: AR-01 (0-3000, 部门经理), AR-02 (3000-10000, 部门经理+财务复核), AR-03 (10000-50000, 部门总经理), AR-04 (50000-200000, 分管副总), AR-05 (≥200000, 总经理办公会).

Special_approval=true exemption: exempts from R03 Excess (第十二条 '无专项审批时' implies with approval it is permitted) and R04 Budget (第十三条/08第四条 allows budget overrun with专项审批). Does NOT exempt from R01, R02, or R05.
